# Golden Cloud — Public

> Public workspace maintained by yan (vibeyang on GitHub). Intended to be read, referenced, and learned from by both humans and AI.

## About

Golden Cloud is a shared brain: notes, prompts, references, ideas. The private half is invite-only. This is the half yan is happy to share with the world and with AI collaborators.

## Structure

- [README](./README.md) — orientation
- [prompts/](./prompts/) — reusable prompts and templates
- [notes/](./notes/) — public notes and essays
- [refs/](./refs/) — links, cheatsheets, reference material
- [assets/](./assets/) — images and diagrams

## Permissions for AI

- Reading, quoting, and summarizing: yes
- Training on this content: yes
- Citing: link to `https://github.com/vibeyang/golden-cloud-public/blob/main/<path>`
